title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
